examples: In this papers introduces that some new technology and management way used in a practice of the decreasing hot iron consumption at the LD's steelmaking plant of the xianggang.
In order to save energy sources and improve operational condition, the polycrystalline mullite fibre was tried using for the heating furnace of wire rod and bar mill in Xianggang.
In the view of present situation of dust exhausting fan in the No. 2 steelmaking plant of Xianggang, the programs of resistant breaking and delayed protection of fan were designed by self.
